mnemonic: kitchen [ки'тчан] кухня - Актёр (Дже-ки Чан) кухню разбил.

examples.eng: Get out of the kitchen!
My mother was in the kitchen.
Lock the cat in the kitchen.
I need to sweep the kitchen.
Who messed up the kitchen?
We've had the kitchen redone.
The kitchen was full of smoke.
She is in the kitchen making a meal.
Is that mess in the kitchen your doing?
examples.ru: Это ты устроил бардак на кухне?

examples.eng: The kitchen was in chaos.
Dinah went into the kitchen.
He's an artist in the kitchen.
examples.ru: На кухне он настоящий мастер своего дела.

examples.eng: Light flooded into the kitchen.
examples.ru: Свет ворвался в кухню. / Кухня залилась светом.

examples.eng: The kitchen needs a good sweep.
We're having the kitchen redone.
The kitchen was small and cramped.
He left a light on in the kitchen.
examples.ru: Он не выключил на кухне свет.

examples.eng: She went downstairs to the kitchen.
examples.ru: Она спустилась по лестнице на кухню.

examples.eng: All assembled in the ample kitchen.
The bedroom connects to the kitchen.
Keep kitchen surfaces clean and tidy.
examples.ru: Держите кухонные поверхности в чистоте и порядке.

examples.eng: What time is it by the kitchen clock?
Good smells emanated from the kitchen.
Hamburgers were cooking in the kitchen.
We updated the kitchen in the old house
examples.ru: Мы обновили кухню в старом доме.

examples.eng: She wants a house with a large kitchen.
examples.ru: Она хочет дом с большой кухней.

examples.eng: I washed my hands under the kitchen tap.
examples.ru: Я помыл руки под кухонным краном.

examples.eng: A lamp was burning in the kitchen window.
examples.ru: В окне кухни горела какая-то лампа.

examples.eng: She dried her hands on the kitchen towel.
examples.ru: Она вытерла ее руки кухонным полотенцем.

examples.eng: We renovated the kitchen three years ago.
examples.ru: Мы делали ремонт на кухне, три года назад.
